profile_basis: Ready [perf] bead frankenjax-iv4mg, filed from a post-pass110 fj-dispatch profile where vmap_scan/functional_sub_jaxpr_add_emit_128x64 was the top non-owned dispatch hotspot at 61.524us midpoint.
lever: dense I64 output buffers for the existing exact add-emit functional scan specialization, plus dense xs reads when available; all other paths fall through to the existing generic batching evaluator
baseline_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-iv4mg-baseline cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_scan/functional_sub_jaxpr_add_emit_128x64 --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
rebench_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-iv4mg-rebench cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_scan/functional_sub_jaxpr_add_emit_128x64 --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
isomorphism_proof: The optimization is inside the pre-existing batch_scan_add_emit_carry_i64 guard; accepted scan/body shapes, carry arity, xs arity, scan length, reverse parameter handling, effect checks, body params, and output arity are unchanged.

Dense xs reads use the same row_offset + scan_idx indexing as the literal-backed path; malformed declared-I64 tensors that do not expose an I64 slice still enter the literal-matching path and return None on the same non-I64 elements as before.

Forward and reverse output ordering is preserved: forward fills increasing scan indices, while reverse iterates decreasing indices and writes each accumulated y back to the original row-major output index.
I64 arithmetic still uses i64::wrapping_add. There is no floating-point, RNG, tie-breaking, or side-effect behavior in the accepted fragment.

The only kept representation change is output storage: final carry and stacked ys are constructed with TensorValue::new_i64_values instead of TensorValue::new(DType::I64, ..., Vec<Literal>). DType, shape, batch_dim, value order, and observable extracted values are unchanged.
validation: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-iv4mg-scan-tests cargo test -p fj-dispatch scan_sub_jaxprs --lib -- --nocapture
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-iv4mg-check cargo check -p fj-dispatch --all-targets
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-iv4mg-tests cargo test -p fj-dispatch --lib
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-iv4mg-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets -- -D warnings
